tagline: Turn everyday chaos into smart wins.

designSystem.style: Modern strategy game UI with vibrant purple-violet primary palette, orange accent, card-based layouts, stat bars, and city grid visualization. Features both light and dark themes with gradient hero cards and micro-interactions.

screens: Home — Daily missions, city health overview, streak tracker, and weekly progress stats
Play — Active scenario with crisis briefing, consequence preview, 3-choice decision system, and impact reveal
Map — 3x3 city grid priority map with status indicators, hidden dependency graph, and critical alerts
Replay — Round-by-round reflection with decision breakdown, outcome analysis, strategic insight, and real-world connection
Profile — User stats, theme toggle, difficulty selector, achievements, and app settings
